元々メガフロル使いたくて組んだ構築のはずなのにフロルだけ弱すぎて大泣き、この枠変えたら構築完成かな？
レンタルと配分も出します！！使い方はリプとアーカイブから↓

配信あざした！序盤負けまくったけど後半からエンジンかかってきて配信内でチャンピオン級乗れました！！
元々フロルを使いたくて組んだ構築のはずなのにフロルだけ弱すぎて大泣き、この枠変えたら構築完成しそう
レンタルと配分貼っときます！使い方はアーカイブとリプ欄へ↓
It’s a damn shame they nerfed Salt Cure. This guy would’ve been a really cool “Anti-Toxapex-Toxapex”

Rethought the damage calc

This should make creating spreads from scratch much easier

- live sliders are mapped to the top meta game pokemon and speed tiers
- as the sliders move up/down, the calcs change that effect the stat
- you can click a calc to pin the calc to the pokemon and share with friends
- powered by the smogon open source damage calc
- speed tiers were calculated off of usage stats and a few rules I manually put in

Still WIP, this will be launched with the teambuilder. Both will be ad-free and free to use.
